parameters.query: INSERT INTO booking_locks (provider_id, start_time, lock_key, acquired_at, expires_at) VALUES ($1::int, $2::timestamp, $3::text, NOW(), NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes') ON CONFLICT (lock_key) DO UPDATE SET acquired_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL '5 minutes' RETURNING lock_id, lock_key, acquired_at, expires_at, (acquired_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes') as is_valid;
DELETE FROM booking_locks WHERE lock_id = $1::int OR lock_key = $2::text;
